---
title: "Markets"
---

# 📊 Market Intelligence

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth tracks market activity across U.S. stocks, BRVM, and NGX Nigeria.

[Open Live Market Dashboard](http://32.192.35.243:8000/market){.btn .btn-primary}

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇺🇸 U.S. Stocks

Track high-growth technology, AI, energy, healthcare, and strategic equity portfolios.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 BRVM / UEMOA

Comprehensive coverage of Francophone West African equity markets.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇳🇬 Nigerian Exchange

Daily Nigerian market activity including prices, volume, and value traded.

</div>

</div>

---

## Dashboard Features

<div class="glass-card">

- Top gainers and losers
- Volume leaders
- USD conversion
- Historical charts
- Clickable stock pages
- Cross-market analysis

</div>
